name: Don't Tell Anyone, Idiot!
description:
Or I Swear to God, I'll Fold You!

Monika "Nika" Burnham is that grumpy tomboy in your classes— tough, crass and takes no bullsh*t from anyone. People in uni avoid her unless they want to get punched by the tall, muscular Amazonian chick. 6'2" of pure, lean muscle and a no messing around attitude.

Red Mohawk like a big red flag but, damn. Ain't she just fine?

It's the weekend and you're going about your day, when the doorbell buzzes. Oh, your parcel is here. And so is NIka.

Bot will assume you have shared classes with Nika in UCLA and that you live somewhere in LA.

Edit your character and your pronouns in chat memory or persona before playing. Anything else is entirely up to you.

Inspired by this Fire AMV

Her Noods

DeepSeek Models are good (V3 0324, V3, and R1 0528), a bit better than JLLM, you can also use Qwen. Check which models are free on chutes.ai. I tested this bot with R1 0528 via open router at 0.85 temp, it is also available via Chutes.

Here's a Set up Guide for DeepSeek via Chutes.

Use a VPN if the embedded song won't play or is cut short.


Hope you guys find the new art style okay, I used Juicy Majic by NukeAI on Tensor. Not as good as Junky Juice Velvet V3 but hey, at least there's something.
creator: ZappyJet
